trains.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 5 to 8 minutes to Roma Street off-peak.

buses.note: Bus routes serve Auchenflower via Milton Road.

driving.motorway_access: Coronation Drive for CBD travel. Western Freeway access.
driving.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 5 to 10 minutes to Brisbane CBD off-peak.

connections: Bicentennial Bikeway along the river to the CBD

secondary_state.name: Indooroopilly State High School or Brisbane State High catchment

lifestyle.shops_dining_note: Auchenflower has small cafe clusters along Milton Road and adjacent streets. Suncorp Stadium is on the doorstep. Toowong Village and the Milton dining strip are within walking distance for many addresses.
lifestyle.river_access: Brisbane River frontage along Coronation Drive and the Bicentennial Bikeway.

pockets.name: Hilltop
pockets.character: Elevated streets with city outlooks. Premium pocket with character homes.

pockets.name: Wesley Hospital area
pockets.character: Streets close to the hospital precinct. Mix of character and apartment stock.

pockets.name: Milton Road corridor
pockets.character: Closer to the arterial. Apartment-heavy stock close to the train and CBD.

buyer_profile.note: Buyers moving from Toowong, Bardon, or Paddington for the riverside positioning.
Wesley Hospital and proximity to UQ via the river make Auchenflower a natural choice for medical and academic professionals.
First home buyers and downsizers attracted to the Milton Road apartment market.
